name: Icon
structurePatterns: Inline-flex container sized by font-size (1em x 1em), inherits color via currentColor
SVG fills the container at 100% width/height with fill:none by default (stroke-based icons)
usageHints: Container: display inline-flex, align-items center, justify-content center
Size controlled via font-size on the wrapper: 12px, 16px (default), 20px, 24px
Color inherited via currentColor; override with style color property
Semantic colors: success=#00B365, warning=#FF7D00, danger=#D7312A, primary=#1664FF, secondary=#737A87
unknowns: full icon name catalog beyond those shown
whether filled variants exist for all icons
